summary: ClashSolverOffsetServiceAroundDuctBoundingBoxCommand — PDF "OFFSET_SERVICE_AROUND_DUCT". Offset the service by the duct's BB extent on the chosen axis + envelope.
usecase: Big-thing-wins service offset when clashing with a duct.
precondition: Active document; service + duct resolvable; both have BoundingBox; default 3D view.
postcondition: Zero or one ElementTransformUtils.MoveElement inside inner Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolve service + duct (resolvers or two-element selection in order).
2) Read both BoundingBoxes; WireError if either missing.
3) Determine vertical relationship: if service centre Z ≤ duct centre Z → axis = -Z (offset below); else +Z (above). "auto" default.
4) step_ft = duct.Max.{axis} - duct.Min.{axis} (duct's extent on that axis) + envelope_mm/304.8.
5) Delegate TryDirectionalMoveOnService.ProbeAndMove(doc, service, axis, step_ft, threshold_ft, centreFallback=false).
6) Emit outcome + picked_axis + step_mm.

successprompts: Offset around duct by {step_mm} mm on {picked_axis}.
